description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Inbound Cross-boundary Transportation Arrangements/Precautions during Labour Day and The Birthday of the Buddha holidays
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 勞動節及佛誕假期入境跨境交通安排/注意事項
description.LOCATION_EN: Inbound Cross-boundary Transportation Arrangements / Precautions during Labour Day and The Birthday of the Buddha holidays
description.LOCATION_CN: 勞動節及佛誕假期入境跨境交通安排/注意事項

2025-05-04T14:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that more travellers would return to Hong Kong via land-based Boundary Control Points later today (4 May) and tomorrow (5 May). It is anticipated that the demand for public transport services will be higher during the period and the waiting time would increase. The Transport Department has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand. In the meantime, the number of cross boundary private cars travelling to / from the Mainland / Macao via the HZMB will also increase substantially. The TD appeals to these inbound travellers to plan their journeys ahead, allow sufficient travelling time and travel outside peak periods as far as possible. In order to plan their journeys ahead, the public can make use of the TD's HKeMobility mobile application to access snapshots of traffic conditions at inbound and outbound vehicle plazas of the Hong Kong Port. They can also check real-time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of the Zhuhai port through the WeChat official accounts "hzmbzhport" or "zhuhaifabu" (traffic-info. gzazhka. com:5015/#/) (Chinese only), and check the forecast of peak hours of inbound and outbound vehicles at the HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official account of the HZMB integrated information dissemination platform (mp. weixin. qq. com/s/PXLza25svheLQZuTXSbwFQ) (Chinese only). The TD will closely monitor the traffic conditions at all BCPs and disseminate the latest traffic information to the public. Members of the public are advised to check the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts, and HKeMobility.
2025-05-04T14:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預計今日較後時間(5月4日)及明日(5月5日)將有較多跨境旅客使用各陸路管制站回港，預計在返港高峰時間的公共運輸需求會較高，乘客候車時間亦會較長。運輸署已指示公共運輸服務營辦商加強服務應付乘客需求。而經港珠澳大橋往返內地／澳門的跨境私家車亦會顯著增加，運輸署呼籲有關旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，盡量選擇於非繁忙時段出行。 市民可透過運輸署流動應用程式「香港出行易」查閱大橋香港口岸出境及入境客車通關廣場的交通快拍，亦可透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務（traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/），查閱大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況；以及透過「港珠澳大橋統一信息發布平台」微信公眾號（mp.weixin.qq.com/s/PXLza25svheLQZuTXSbwFQ），查看大橋珠海口岸車輛出入境高峰時段預測，以便及早計劃行程。 運輸署會密切留意各口岸的交通情況，並向市民發放最新交通消息。請市民留意電台、電視台及「香港出行易」發放的最新交通消息。

2025-05-05T10:23:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that more travellers would return to Hong Kong via land-based Boundary Control Points today (5 May). It is anticipated that the demand for public transport services will be higher during the period and the waiting time would increase. The Transport Department has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand. In the meantime, the number of cross boundary private cars travelling to / from the Mainland / Macao via the HZMB will also increase substantially. The TD appeals to these inbound travellers to plan their journeys ahead, allow sufficient travelling time and travel outside peak periods as far as possible. In order to plan their journeys ahead, the public can make use of the TD's HKeMobility mobile application to access snapshots of traffic conditions at inbound and outbound vehicle plazas of the Hong Kong Port. They can also check real-time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of the Zhuhai port through the WeChat official accounts "hzmbzhport" or "zhuhaifabu" (traffic-info. gzazhka. com:5015/#/) (Chinese only), and check the forecast of peak hours of inbound and outbound vehicles at the HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official account of the HZMB integrated information dissemination platform (mp. weixin. qq. com/s/PXLza25svheLQZuTXSbwFQ) (Chinese only). The TD will closely monitor the traffic conditions at all BCPs and disseminate the latest traffic information to the public. Members of the public are advised to check the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts, and HKeMobility.

2025-05-04T15:16:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to watermain burst , part of the lanes of Prince Edward Road West (Mong Kok bound) near Waterloo Road is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   At the same time, vehicles cannot make left turning from Prince Edward Road West (Mong Kok bound) to Waterloo Road.   Traffic is busy now.
2025-05-04T15:16:00.CONTENT_CN:
因水管爆裂，太子道西(往旺角方向)近窩打老道的部份行車線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  同時，車輛不能由太子道西(往旺角方向)左轉窩打老道。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2025-05-04T16:05:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to watermain burst , part of the lanes of Prince Edward Road West (Mong Kok bound) near Waterloo Road is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Vehicles cannot make left turning from Prince Edward Road West (Mong Kok bound) to Waterloo Road (Yau Ma Tei bound). 
At the same time, vehicles from Waterloo Road (Lion Rock Tunnel bound) can only make left turning to Prince Edward Road West (Mong Kok bound).   Traffic is busy now.
2025-05-04T16:05:00.CONTENT_CN:
因水管爆裂，太子道西(往旺角方向)近窩打老道的部份行車線仍然封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  ⾞輛不能由太⼦道西(往旺⾓⽅向)左轉窩打⽼道(往油麻地方向)。
同時，由窩打⽼道(往獅子山隧道方向)的車輛只能左轉太子道西(往旺⾓方向)。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2025-05-04T18:39:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , the slow lane of Prince Edward Road West (Mong Kok bound) near Waterloo Road is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Vehicles from Waterloo Road (Lion Rock Tunnel bound) can only make left turning to Prince Edward Road West (Mong Kok bound). Traffic is busy now.
2025-05-04T18:39:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，太子道西(往旺角方向)近窩打老道的慢線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 由窩打⽼道(往獅子山隧道方向)的車輛只能左轉太子道西(往旺⾓方向)。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2025-05-04T19:42:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , the slow lane of Prince Edward Road West (Mong Kok bound) near Waterloo Road is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.
2025-05-04T19:42:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，太子道西(往旺角方向)近窩打老道的慢線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。

2025-05-05T21:57:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to watermain emergency works , the slow lane of Prince Edward Road West (Mong Kok bound) near Waterloo Road is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. 
At the same time, vehicles cannot make right turning from Waterloo Road (northbound) via Prince Edward Road West onto Boundary Street.
2025-05-05T21:57:00.CONTENT_CN:
因水管緊急維修，太子道西(往旺角方向)近窩打老道的慢線仍然封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。
同時，車輛不能由窩打老道(北行)經太子道西右轉界限街。

2025-05-06T06:11:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Prince Edward Road West (Mong Kok bound) near Waterloo Road which was closed due to watermain emergency works is re-opened to all traffic. At the same time, the traffic arrangement of banning right turning from Waterloo Road (northbound) via Prince Edward Road West onto Boundary Street which was implemented before is now cancelled.
2025-05-06T06:11:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因水管緊急維修而封閉的太子道西(往旺角方向)近窩打老道的慢線現已解封。 同時，較早前實施的禁止車輛由窩打⽼道(北⾏)經太⼦道西右轉界限街的行車措施現已取消。

2025-05-05T16:37:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to malfunction of traffic lights at the junction of Clear Water Bay Road and New Clear Water Bay Road, motorists are advised to drive with utmost care when passing through the road junctions, pay extra attention to the traffic signs and safety of pedestrians. Pedestrians please pay attention to vehicles when crossing junctions with malfunctioned traffic lights.
2025-05-05T16:37:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於清⽔灣道和新清⽔灣道交界路⼝的交通燈失靈，駕駛⼈⼠在駛經有關路⼝時，請加倍⼩⼼，注意交通標誌的指⽰並留意過路⾏⼈的安全。⾏⼈在交通燈失靈的路⼝橫過⾺路時，請特別注意⾞輛。

2025-05-05T17:21:00.CONTENT_EN: The traffic lights at the junction of Clear Water Bay Road and New Clear Water Bay Road have resumed normal services.

2025-05-06T08:33:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident, vehicles making turns from Austin Road (Both Bounds) onto Cox's Road are prohibited. Traffic is busy now.

2025-05-06T09:18:00.CONTENT_EN: The traffic arrangement of banning turns to Cox's Road from Austin Road (both bounds) which was implemented before due to traffic accident is now cancelled.

2025-05-06T09:10:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , the middle lane of West Kowloon Highway (Western Harbour Crossing bound) near Hoi Tat Estate is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2025-05-06T09:10:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛故障，西九龍公路(往西區海底隧道方向)近海達邨的中線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2025-05-06T09:15:00.CONTENT_EN: The middle lane of West Kowloon Highway (Western Harbour Crossing bound) near Hoi Tat Estate which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic.
2025-05-06T09:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而封閉的西九龍公路(往西區海底隧道方向)近海達邨的中線現已解封。

2025-05-06T09:47:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Leighton Road (both bounds) near Canal Road East are closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2025-05-06T09:47:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，禮頓道(來回方向)近堅拿道東的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2025-05-07T13:22:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2025-05-07T13:22:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。
